# Lurumi

## What is Lurumi?
Lurumi is an AI-powered Progressive Web App (PWA) for crochet, amigurumi, and knitting enthusiasts in Italy.

## Key Features
- **AI Chat Assistant**: Ask anything about crochet, amigurumi patterns, yarn types, and knitting techniques.
- **AI Image Generation**: Generate pattern inspiration images using DALL-E 3 and Flux AI models.
- **Vision Analysis**: Upload photos of your work-in-progress for AI feedback and stitch counting.
- **Round Counter**: Track stitch counts and rounds with customizable per-project counters.
- **Project Manager**: Organize crochet and knitting projects with images, notes, and PDFs.
- **YouTube Tutorial Tracker**: Save YouTube crochet tutorials with AI-generated transcripts and Italian translations.
- **Live Courses**: Book in-person and online crochet and amigurumi workshops.
- **Background Removal & Generation**: AI tools to create professional product photos of finished projects.
- **PDF Pattern Viewer**: Read and annotate PDF crochet patterns within the app.

## Who is it for?
Italian-speaking crochet and knitting hobbyists, amigurumi makers, and crafters who want AI assistance.

## Language
Italian (Italian UI, Italian AI responses, Italian tutorials focus)

## Technology
Next.js PWA, installable on Android and iOS, works offline.

## URL
https://lurumi.it

## Contact
info@lurumi.it

## Pricing
- Free tier: 50 AI credits/month
- Premium tier: 300 AI credits/month (Stripe subscription)
